← SUPERSLOTCAR.COM

PIT NOTES

Updates from the workshop, straight off the bench.

2026-07-09 IN THE NEXT BUILD

THE JOB IS ON THE BOARD

Before the lights, a normal race used to shout a vague little welcome in the same oversized type as GO. It had plenty of volume and not much information.

The new pit board says exactly what is at stake: FINISH IN THE TOP 3, plus the race type underneath. It is deliberately calmer than the start lights, easy to read at a glance, and clears off before the launch.

Showdowns and grudge matches have kept their rival posters. Those are personal. This board is for the business of getting paid.

Small print: the objective and strike rules have not changed — only the way the game tells you about them.
